_comment: Vein Guardian Beast — Renegade Immortal. A territorial beast that guards spirit stone veins. Canon: appears near mineral-rich cave systems.
name: Vein Guardian Beast

canonical.appearance: A massive, earth-toned quadruped with crystalline protrusions growing from its back and shoulders. Slow but incredibly durable. Resembles an armadillo crossed with a golem.
canonical.behavior: Strictly territorial — never leaves its vein. Does not chase far. Extremely high defense but slow. Attacks with crystal slam.
canonical.habitat: Spirit stone veins, deep caves, mining-rich mountain interiors
canonical.cultivation: Foundation Establishment to Soul Transformation equivalent (scales with vein quality)
canonical.diet: Absorbs spirit stone energy directly from the vein it guards
canonical.relationships: Neutral to cultivators who don't approach the vein. Mortal miners are generally ignored. Cultivators who mine the vein are attacked.
techniques: Vein heal (regenerates HP when near its vein)
mutations: Vein Bond — while within 20 blocks of its home vein, HP regeneration 5x
canonical.ecology: Apex cave predator. Symbiotic with the spirit vein — the vein sustains it, and its presence enriches the vein.

art_direction.model_notes: Large quadruped with crystal growths. Slow, heavy animations. Crystal glow pulses.
art_direction.texture_notes: Earthy brown-green hide with embedded crystal shards. Glowing amber cracks in stone-like armor plating.
